title: Record: GDN-Hybrid + Sliding Window Attention + compressed-code warmdown1000 (cold-cache, 1.01671 BPB)
author: joshkmartinez

data.description: GDN-hybrid backbone with a sliding-window attention side path / SWA_shared structure.
GDN-hybrid backbone with repeated GDN blocks and sliding-window attention.
Compressed-code packaging for train_gpt.py, architectures.py, and configs.py to recover artifact-size headroom.

novel_contributions: Repaired compressed-code warmdown1000 bundle for the GDN-Hybrid family
